entity: Michael Jordan All-Star selections = 14 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(DISTINCT season) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_award WHERE player_id = 893 AND award_type = 'All-Star'

notes: Michael Jordan's 14 All-Star selections (3 AS-MVP, tied for second-most behind Bob Pettit's 4 and tied with Kobe). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 14. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
